mapper.sql: vp.id, vp.user_id, vp.id_card, vp.gender, vp.birth_date, vp.age, vp.address, vp.emergency_contact, vp.emergency_phone, vp.skills, vp.service_area, vp.available_time, vp.volunteer_status, vp.approve_time, vp.approve_by, vp.service_hours, vp.task_count, vp.average_rating, vp.introduction, vp.photo_url, vp.created_time, vp.updated_time, u.username, u.full_name, u.phone, u.email, u.avatar
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM volunteer_profile vp INNER JOIN sys_user u ON vp.user_id = u.id WHERE 1=1
AND vp.volunteer_status = #{status}
AND (u.full_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR vp.skills LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY CASE vp.volunteer_status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 1 WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN 2 WHEN 'SUSPENDED' THEN 3 WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN 4 END, vp.created_time DESC
SELECT FROM volunteer_profile vp INNER JOIN sys_user u ON vp.user_id = u.id WHERE vp.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM volunteer_profile vp INNER JOIN sys_user u ON vp.user_id = u.id WHERE vp.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE volunteer_profile SET id_card = #{idCard}, gender = #{gender}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, age = #{age}, address = #{address}, emergency_contact = #{emergencyContact}, emergency_phone = #{emergencyPhone}, skills = #{skills}, service_area = #{serviceArea}, available_time = #{availableTime}, introduction = #{introduction}, photo_url = #{photoUrl} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM volunteer_profile WHERE volunteer_status = 'APPROVED'
